title: It is... that/who + 強調部分（強調句）

formulas.formula: It is/was + 強調部分（人/事/物/時間/地點） + that + 剩餘句子
formulas.zh: 就是……（強調句中某一成分）

formulas.formula: It is/was + 強調部分（人） + who + 剩餘句子
formulas.zh: 就是某人……（強調人物時可用 who 替代 that）

explanation: 分裂句（cleft sentence）是將一個完整句子拆開，把要強調的部分放在 It is/was 與 that/who 之間，藉此突顯該成分。可強調主詞、受詞、時間副詞、地點副詞等，但不能強調動詞或形容詞。若強調的是「人」，that 可替換為 who；強調「物、時間、地點」則只用 that。判斷是否為分裂句的方法：將 It is/was 與 that/who 去掉後，剩餘部分應能還原為一個完整句子。時態上，主要事件在過去用 was，在現在或一般事實用 is。

examples.eng: It was my grandmother who taught me how to cook traditional dishes.
examples.chi: 就是我的祖母教我如何烹煮傳統菜餚。

examples.eng: It is hard work that leads to true success in the long run.
examples.chi: 就是努力付出才能在長遠中帶來真正的成功。

examples.eng: It was in the library that I found the book I had been looking for.
examples.chi: 就是在圖書館裡，我找到了一直在尋找的那本書。

examples.eng: It was not until midnight that she finally finished her research paper.
examples.chi: 直到午夜她才終於完成了她的研究報告。

extension.tip: 判斷分裂句的方法：將 It is/was 和 that/who 同時刪除，若剩下的部分能組成一個文法正確、語意完整的句子，就是分裂句。若刪除後句意不完整，則 It 可能是虛主詞或代名詞，並非分裂句結構。

examples.test: It was Tom that broke the window. → 去掉 It was 和 that → Tom broke the window.
examples.result: → 句意完整，確認為分裂句，強調主詞 Tom。

examples.test: It is important that you arrive on time.
examples.result: → 去掉 It is 和 that → important you arrive on time（不完整），這不是分裂句，而是虛主詞句型。

examples.test: It was yesterday that I met her. vs. I met her yesterday.
examples.result: → 分裂句強調時間 yesterday，還原後為完整句 I met her yesterday。

extension.note: 去掉 It is/was 和 that，能還原完整句就是分裂句！

parts: helped me get through the difficult time.
exercises.sentence: It was my best friend who helped me get through the difficult time.
exercises.translation: 就是我最好的朋友幫助我度過了那段艱難的時光。

parts: we enjoyed the most delicious street food.
exercises.sentence: It was in Tainan that we enjoyed the most delicious street food.
exercises.translation: 就是在台南，我們品嚐到了最美味的街頭小吃。

parts: gave me the courage to try again.
exercises.sentence: It was her encouragement that gave me the courage to try again.
exercises.translation: 就是她的鼓勵給了我再次嘗試的勇氣。

parts: she finally realized the importance of teamwork.
blanks: It was not until she failed that
exercises.sentence: It was not until she failed that she finally realized the importance of teamwork.
exercises.translation: 直到她失敗了，她才終於了解團隊合作的重要性。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的強調句形式，填入空格
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ my best friend who helped me through the difficult time.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「It was」。句子強調的是「my best friend」（人），用過去時 was，搭配 who 引導剩餘部分。這是標準的人物強調句。B 項用現在式不符時態；C 項 were 文法錯誤；D 項完成式不適當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當詞語完成強調句，強調時間副詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was during the summer vacation _______ we decided to travel abroad.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C「that」。強調時間副詞「during the summer vacation」時，必須用 that 連接（不能用 when）。A 項 who 用於強調人；B 項 when 是時間從屬連詞，不是強調句用法；D 項 which 不能用於強調句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的強調句，強調地點副詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ in this small village _______ the old tradition has been preserved for centuries.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C「It is / that」。強調地點副詞「in this small village」時，用 It is 搭配 that（不能用 where）。where 是相關詞，不是強調句用法。A 項 when 用於時間；B 項 where 用於相關詞；D 項 was 時態不符，which 不用於強調句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷強調句的正確形式，強調複合主詞和受詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the combination of talent, hard work, and perseverance _______ enables ordinary people to achieve extraordinary success.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「It is / that」。強調複雜名詞片語主詞時，用 It is 搭配 that，後接動詞。去掉 It is...that 後應還原為「The combination of talent, hard work, and perseverance enables...」。B 項 who 只用於強調人；C 項 which 不用於強調句；D 項結構重複錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 是你的努力讓你考上這所大學的。
translation_exercises.answer: It is your hard work that helped you get into this university.
key_points: It is + 強調部分(your hard work)
hints: 句型框架：It is + 強調部分 + that + 主詞 + 動詞 + 受詞
注意：強調「物」(your hard work)用 that，不用 who

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天我在圖書館遇到的就是我的高中同學。
translation_exercises.answer: It was my high school classmate whom I met in the library yesterday.
key_points: It was + 強調部分(my high school classmate)
whom I met in the library yesterday
hints: 句型框架：It is/was + 強調部分(人) + that/who + 剩餘句子；強調的人作受詞時可用 whom
注意：去掉『It was...whom』後應能還原為『I met my high school classmate in the library yesterday』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 正是因為他們的支持，我才有勇氣參加這次演講比賽。
translation_exercises.answer: It is their support that gave me the courage to participate in this speech competition.
key_points: It is + 強調部分(their support)
表達『因為...才...』的因果關係
hints: 句型框架：It is + 強調部分(事物) + that + 剩餘完整句子；強調原因用 that
提示：英文不能直譯『因為...才...』，而是強調支持這個事物本身對結果的影響

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到高中最後一年，我才真正體會到時間管理的重要性。
translation_exercises.answer: It was not until the last year of high school that I truly realized the importance of time management.
key_points: It was not until + 時間點
強調時間副詞(the last year of high school)
hints: 句型框架：It was not until + 時間 + that + 主詞 + 動詞；此為『not...until』的強調句用法
注意：『not until』強調句固定搭配，表示『直到...才...』，去掉強調部分後應還原為『I did not realize...until the last year of high school』
